title: AST Violate DVPO/Unlawful Contact/VCOR: Homer [AK25108037]
summary: On 10/24/2025, Alaska State Troopers investigated a report of a DVPO violation that had occurred several weeks prior. Subsequent investigation led to Rueben Lopez, age 44, being charged with violating a domestic violence protective order, unlawful contact in the 1st degree, and violating his conditi...

title: AST Search and Rescue: Fairbanks [AK25108280]
summary: On 10/25/2025, at approximately 1804 hours, Fairbanks AST Dispatch was contacted by an adult male who was lost near Isabelle Creek in Fairbanks. Fairbanks AWT and AST responded on foot, located the male and his dog, and escorted them back to their nearby residence.

title: AST DWLR: Glennallen [AK25108274]
summary: On 10/25/2025 at approximately 1729 hours a Trooper recognized Michael Harris driving near Glennallen and conducted a traffic stop. Harris has a revoked license. He was cited for driving revoked and drug paraphernalia was seized from the vehicle.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: approximately 1729 hours a Trooper recognized Michael Harris driving near Glennallen and conducted a traffic stop

title: AST Homicide: Fairbanks [AK25108121]
summary: UPDATE 12/4: On December 3, 2025, the Alaska State Troopers and US Marshals located Darius Morgan hiding at a residence in Fairbanks after receiving a tip. Morgan was arrested and remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center on his outstanding arrest warrants. Two residents of the house, 19-year-old Fairbanks resident Maya Kokrine and 21-year-old Fairbanks resident Matthew Wintter, were both remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center on charges of Hindering Prosecution for their efforts to hide Morgan. Morgan's arrest was due to the significant efforts of the Fairbanks and Palmer State Trooper Criminal Suppression Units, ABI Investigators from across the state, and the US Marshals Service. Thank you to everyone who provided information that aided our initial investigation and helped locate and
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

charges: Hindering Prosecution for their efforts to hide Morgan

title: State begins distributing disaster aid to residents of Western Alaska, federal aid also approved
summary: Alaska Air National Guard C-17 Globemaster III aircrew, assigned to the 176th Wing, arrive at Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson, Alaska, with 62 evacuated residents from western Alaska, Oct. 17, 2025. (Alaska National Guard photo by Alejandro Peña) The State of Alaska has begun distributing disaster relief payments, totaling over $217,000 as of Friday , to residents of western Alaska impacted by storm damage from ex-Typhoon Halong. title: John Crowther Appointed Acting DNR Commissioner
summary: Governor Mike Dunleavy has appointed John Crowther acting commissioner of the Alaska Department of Natural Resources effective today. title: Chicago and most cities with National Guard deployments are safer than Anchorage, stats show
summary: WASHINGTON, DC - AUGUST 28: Members of the National Guard carrying rifles patrol near the Lincoln Memorial on the National Mall on August 28, 2025 in Washington, DC. The Trump administration has deployed federal officers and the National Guard to the District in order to place the DC Metropolitan Police Department under federal control and assist in crime prevention in the nation's capital.
